release_notes: v0.9 — Fixed a bug that silently broke the auto-updater on every version (it could never detect a real update until now); added a manual Check for Updates option to the Help menu. Intelligence Engine now tracks negative/unfavorable brand mentions separately from positive ones, and correctly distinguishes real visibility gaps from product categories the brand simply doesn't compete in. More resilient to API errors, with a first real automated test suite behind the scenes. Various UI fixes: Intelligence page layout, provider status indicators, splash screen, and Trends chart clarity.
